title: Babel - Lore Books Loot
description: A customisable data pack for pre-written book loot. Adds over 160 lore books to various loot tables in Minecraft, and Lost Libraries to worldgen.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q2ijOw2s/images/b7ee5c7734f418714bc6b3506b05c90a3ced53c2.png)
## A customisable data pack for lore books

Babel Book Loot adds over 160 pre-written lore books from a variety of "in-universe" authors to Minecraft. Books are can be fished up with a fishing rod, or found in villages, stronghold libraries and woodland mansions in chests. If you are hero of the village, librarians throw a guaranteed copyable book.

You will also be able to find a new randomly generating structures, **Lost Libraries** which have book-related loot!

You can customise the library by adding your own books. For more information on how to customise the books in the pack to your liking, see the [project homepage](https://github.com/JiFish/babel#readme).

You can also customise where the books can be found (including dropped by zombies if killed by a player) and integrate the loot in to your own datapacks and mods.

![Gameplay example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/q2ijOw2s/images/7adfded92122a28f48df1e1f5dba29807dedb77b.webp)
